back_translation: And the LORD said to Moses and to Eleazar son of Aaron the priest, saying:
'Lift up the head of all the congregation of the sons of Israel, from the son of twenty years and upward, by the house of their fathers, all who go out to war in Israel.'
And Moses and Eleazar the priest spoke with them in the plains of Moab, by the Jordan of Jericho, saying:
'From the son of twenty years and upward, as the LORD commanded Moses.' And the sons of Israel who came out from the land of Egypt:
Reuben, firstborn of Israel; sons of Reuben: Hanoch, clan of the Hanochite; of Pallu, clan of the Palluite.
Of Hezron, clan of the Hezronite; of Carmi, clan of the Carmite.
These are the clans of the Reubenite; and their numbered ones were 43,730.
And the sons of Pallu — Eliab.

And the sons of Eliab — Nemuel, and Dathan, and Abiram; he is Dathan and Abiram, the called ones of the congregation, who contended against Moses and against Aaron in the company of Korah when they contended against the LORD.
And the earth opened its mouth and swallowed them and Korah, in the death of the congregation, when the fire consumed the 250 men; and they became a sign.
And the sons of Korah did not die.
Sons of Simeon by their clans: of Nemuel, clan of the Nemuelite; of Jamin, clan of the Jaminite; of Jachin, clan of the Jachinite.
Of Zerah, clan of the Zerahite; of Shaul, clan of the Shaulite.
These are the clans of the Simeonite — 22,200.
Sons of Gad by their clans: of Zephon, clan of the Zephonite; of Haggi, clan of the Haggite; of Shuni, clan of the Shunite.
Of Ozni, clan of the Oznite; of Eri, clan of the Erite.
Of Arod, clan of the Arodite; of Areli, clan of the Arelite.
These are the clans of the sons of Gad according to their numbered ones — 40,500.
Sons of Judah: Er and Onan; and Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan.
And the sons of Judah were by their clans: of Shelah, clan of the Shelanite; of Perez, clan of the Perezite; of Zerah, clan of the Zerahite.
And the sons of Perez were: of Hezron, clan of the Hezronite; of Hamul, clan of the Hamulite.
These are the clans of Judah according to their numbered ones — 76,500.
Sons of Issachar by their clans: Tola, clan of the Tolaite; of Puvah, clan of the Punite.
Of Jashub, clan of the Jashubite; of Shimron, clan of the Shimronite.
These are the clans of Issachar according to their numbered ones — 64,300.
Sons of Zebulun by their clans: of Sered, clan of the Seredite; of Elon, clan of the Elonite; of Jahleel, clan of the Jahleelite.
These are the clans of the Zebulunite according to their numbered ones — 60,500.
Sons of Joseph by their clans: Manasseh and Ephraim.
Sons of Manasseh: of Machir, clan of the Machirite; and Machir fathered Gilead; of Gilead, clan of the Gileadite.
These are the sons of Gilead: Iezer, clan of the Iezerite; of Helek, clan of the Helekite.
And Asriel, clan of the Asrielite; and Shechem, clan of the Shechemite.
And Shemida, clan of the Shemidaite; and Hepher, clan of the Hepherite.
And Zelophehad son of Hepher — there were no sons to him, but only daughters; and the name of the daughters of Zelophehad: Mahlah and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.
These are the clans of Manasseh; and their numbered ones — 52,700.
These are the sons of Ephraim by their clans: of Shuthelah, clan of the Shuthelahite; of Becher, clan of the Becherite; of Tahan, clan of the Tahanite.
And these are the sons of Shuthelah: of Eran, clan of the Eranite.
These are the clans of the sons of Ephraim according to their numbered ones — 32,500; these are the sons of Joseph by their clans.
Sons of Benjamin by their clans: of Bela, clan of the Belaite; of Ashbel, clan of the Ashbelite; of Ahiram, clan of the Ahiramite.
Of Shupham, clan of the Shuphamite; of Hupham, clan of the Huphamite.
And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: clan of the Ardite; of Naaman, clan of the Naamite.
These are the sons of Benjamin by their clans; and their numbered ones — 45,600.
These are the sons of Dan by their clans: of Shuham, clan of the Shuhamite; these are the clans of Dan by their clans.
All the clans of the Shuhamite according to their numbered ones — 64,400.
Sons of Asher by their clans: of Imnah, clan of the Imnite; of Ishvi, clan of the Ishvite; of Beriah, clan of the Beriite.
For the sons of Beriah: of Heber, clan of the Heberite; of Malchiel, clan of the Malchielite.
And the name of the daughter of Asher was Serah.
These are the clans of the sons of Asher according to their numbered ones — 53,400.
Sons of Naphtali by their clans: of Jahzeel, clan of the Jahzeelite; of Guni, clan of the Gunite.
Of Jezer, clan of the Jezerite; of Shillem, clan of the Shillemite.
These are the clans of Naphtali by their clans; and their numbered ones — 45,400.
These are the numbered ones of the sons of Israel — 601,730.
And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
'To these the land shall be apportioned as an inheritance, by the number of names.'
'To the many you shall increase his inheritance, and to the few you shall decrease his inheritance; each one according to his numbered ones shall his inheritance be given.'
'But by lot the land shall be apportioned; according to the names of the tribes of their fathers they shall inherit.'
'According to the lot, his inheritance shall be apportioned, between many to few.'
And these are the numbered ones of the Levite by their clans: of Gershon, clan of the Gershonite; of Kohath, clan of the Kohathite; of Merari, clan of the Merarite.
These are the clans of Levi: the clan of the Libnite, the clan of the Hebronite, the clan of the Mahlite, the clan of the Mushite, the clan of the Korahite; and Kohath fathered Amram.
And the name of the wife of Amram was Jochebed, daughter of Levi, whom she bore for Levi in Egypt; and she bore for Amram — Aaron and Moses, and Miriam their sister.
And there was born to Aaron — Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.
And Nadab and Abihu died when they offered strange fire before the LORD.

And their numbered ones were 23,000, every male from the son of a month and upward; for they were not numbered in the midst of the sons of Israel, because no inheritance was given to them in the midst of the sons of Israel.
These are the numbered ones of Moses and Eleazar the priest, who numbered the sons of Israel in the plains of Moab by the Jordan of Jericho.
And among these there was not a man from the numbered ones of Moses and Aaron the priest, who numbered the sons of Israel in the Wilderness of Sinai.
For the LORD had said to them: 'Dying they shall die in the wilderness.' And there was not left of them a man, except Caleb son of Jephunneh, and Joshua son of Nun.
